basic_details.job_title: CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has released the official Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Recruitment 2026 notification for 2 vacancies. The recruitment has been announced for eligible candidates with a Bachelor of Laws (L.L.B.) degree. Interested candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria can submit their online applications on or before 24 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application details are available below.

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Bachelor of Laws (L.L.B.) degree from a recognized university. Enrolled as an Advocate with the Bar Council of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh High Court. At least 10 years of experience as an Advocate, with substantial experience in handling criminal cases.

salary_details.details: Retainer fee per year: Rs. 50,000/- Daily fee per case per day (For Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata and Chennai): Rs. 15,000/- Daily fee per case per day (For cities other than Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata and Chennai): Rs. 10,000/- Drafting fee per case for drafting, pleading, reply to petitions, ground of appeals etc.: Rs. 5000/- Clerkage in a case or batch of cases irrespective of number of hearings: 10% of daily fee, subject to maximum of Rs. 3000/- Out of pocket expenses in a case or batch of cases (till its final disposal payable on the bills): Rs. 1000/-

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CBI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Recruitment 2026 - Overview
CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CBI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Bachelor of Laws (L.L.B.) degree from a recognized university. Enrolled as an Advocate with the Bar Council of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh High Court. At least 10 years of experience as an Advocate, with substantial experience in handling criminal cases.

content_sections.heading: CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Retainer fee per year: Rs. 50,000/- Daily fee per case per day (For Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata and Chennai): Rs. 15,000/- Daily fee per case per day (For cities other than Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata and Chennai): Rs. 10,000/- Drafting fee per case for drafting, pleading, reply to petitions, ground of appeals etc.: Rs. 5000/- Clerkage in a case or batch of cases irrespective of number of hearings: 10% of daily fee, subject to maximum of Rs. 3000/- Out of pocket expenses in a case or batch of cases (till its final disposal payable on the bills): Rs. 1000/-

content_sections.heading: CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CBI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the CBI Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) recruitment is 24th July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Special Public Prosecutor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor of Laws (L.L.B.) degree from a recognized university and be enrolled as an Advocate with the Bar Council of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh High Court.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Special Public Prosecutor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the post of Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) in the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI).

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted through the online mode only. Offline applications will not be considered.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel)?
faq.answer: The salary includes a retainer fee of Rs. 50,000/- per year, along with daily fees per case, drafting fees, clerkage, and out-of-pocket expenses as detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have at least 10 years of experience as an Advocate, with substantial experience in handling criminal cases.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of CBI for recruitment information?
faq.answer: The official website of the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) where you can find recruitment information is https://cbi.gov.in/Resources/vacancies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Special Public Prosecutor (Retainer Counsel) position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is Contractual engagement.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the CBI cases be conducted by the Special Public Prosecutors?
faq.answer: The CBI cases will be conducted in the High Court of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh at Jammu.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this CBI recruitment is 1867/117/Estt/CBI/ACB/JMU.
